title: T-021 — API: WO release transition + hard-lock reservation creation
prompt:
Implement Server Action `releaseWorkOrder(wo_id)` per PRD §8.7 + §9.2 (revised v3.1). Calls wo_state_machine_v1 DRAFT→RELEASED transition. Side-effect: per wo_material with material_source='stock' (ONLY), find available LP via FEFO (§9.2), insert wo_material_reservations with hard_lock semantics, update license_plates.status='reserved' + reserved_for_wo_id. material_source='upstream_wo_output' rows are SKIPPED (zero reservation per v3.1). V-PLAN-RES-005 enforced at insert. V-PLAN-WO-008 enforced via T-006 partial-unique index (LP single active reservation).

Captures allergen_profile_snapshot from product master (03-TECHNICAL §10) into wo.allergen_profile_snapshot at release.

RED test asserts (a) reservation rows only for stock-source materials, (b) upstream_wo_output skipped, (c) concurrent release for same LP returns 409 V-PLAN-WO-008, (d) allergen snapshot captured.

pipeline_inputs.description: WO release transition with hard-lock reservation side-effect (RM root only per v3.1).
pipeline_inputs.details: Encode reservation creation as DSL side-effect of wo_state_machine_v1 transition or as service hook subscribed to outbox event 'wo.state_changed' (synchronous within same tx). FEFO query: LP WHERE product_id = m.product_id AND warehouse_id = wo.warehouse_id AND status='available' AND remaining_qty >= m.required_qty ORDER BY expiry_date ASC LIMIT 1. Multiple LPs picked if needed. allergen_profile_snapshot read from products.allergen_profile JSONB (03-TECHNICAL §10).
acceptance_criteria: Given a WO with 3 wo_materials (2 stock, 1 upstream_wo_output), when releaseWorkOrder runs, then exactly 2 wo_material_reservations rows are inserted; the upstream_wo_output material has none.
Given two WOs racing to release reserving the same LP, when both transactions commit, then exactly one succeeds and the other returns HTTP 409 with code 'V-PLAN-WO-008'.
Given a product with allergen_profile JSONB present, when WO releases, then wo.allergen_profile_snapshot equals that JSONB.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/server/actions/planning/__tests__/wo-release.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED tests for reservation scope (stock vs upstream), hard-lock conflict, allergen snapshot capture, outbox emit.
risk_red_lines: Do not create reservations for upstream_wo_output materials — v3.1 narrowed scope; V-PLAN-RES-005 hard block.
Do not split reservation insertion across multiple transactions.
Do not skip allergen_profile_snapshot capture — sequencing in §10 depends on it.
